title.zh: 哈尔克岛遭多次打击，特朗普发出'文明消亡'威胁，伊朗誓言跨区域报复
title.en: Kharg Island Hit Multiple Times, Trump Issues 'Civilization Will Die' Threat, Iran Vows Cross-Regional Retaliation

title.zh: Deadline倒计时：空袭伊朗桥梁火车站，特朗普称'整个文明今晚将消亡'，美军再次打击哈尔克岛
title.en: Countdown to Deadline: Airstrikes Hit Iranian Bridges and Train Station, Trump Warns 'Whole Civilization Will Die Tonight', US Strikes Kharg Island Again

title.zh: 特朗普警告期限到临：以色列警告伊朗人停用火车，沙特关闭与巴林通道
title.en: Trump's Deadline Looms: Israel Warns Iranians to Avoid Trains, Saudi Closes Link to Bahrain

title.zh: Deadline到期前夕：伊朗拒绝临时停火，特朗普威胁4小时摧毁基础设施
title.en: Eve of Deadline: Iran Rejects Ceasefire, Trump Threatens to Destroy Infrastructure in 4 Hours
